scripts.review:frontend: git add -N . && (git diff HEAD --quiet && echo 'No changes to review.' || git diff HEAD | claude --agent frontend -p "Review this git diff including any new files. Focus on React/TypeScript/Tailwind: component patterns, hooks, types, performance, and accessibility.")
scripts.review:backend: git add -N . && (git diff HEAD --quiet && echo 'No changes to review.' || git diff HEAD | claude --agent backend -p "Review this git diff including any new files. Focus on Route Handlers, Server Actions, TypeScript, security, error handling, and caching.")
scripts.review:design: git add -N . && (git diff HEAD --quiet && echo 'No changes to review.' || git diff HEAD | claude --agent design -p "Review this git diff including any new files. Focus on layout, spacing, visual hierarchy, motion, and consistency with the existing design system.")
scripts.review:portfolio: git add -N . && (git diff HEAD --quiet && echo 'No changes to review.' || git diff HEAD | claude --agent portfolio -p "Review this git diff including any new files for portfolio impact: content quality, SEO, recruiter experience, and section effectiveness.")
scripts.review: git add -N . && (git diff HEAD --quiet && echo 'No changes to review.' || git diff HEAD | claude -p "Review this git diff including any new files. Cover all relevant domains: frontend code quality, visual design, and portfolio effectiveness. Flag any issues worth fixing before committing.")
